notes: Static HTML + Bootstrap 5 site. Auto-deploys on push to main.

tasks.title: Commit all uncommitted work
tasks.description: Stage and commit all current changes: content rewrites (index.html, route-accounting, pricing), SEO additions (favicon, JSON-LD, robots.txt, sitemap.xml), new legal pages (privacy-policy.html, terms-of-service.html), 404 page, footer updates, state JSON files, default.json typo fix, ny.html deletion. Split into logical commits: 1) content rewrites, 2) SEO/legal/404, 3) state JSON files.

tasks.title: Add state JSON: AZ, AR, CT, DE, DC, HI, ID
tasks.description: Create assets/js/{state}.json for AZ, AR, CT, DE, DC, HI, ID. Follow the exact pattern in ga.json: name, why_ruby_pro (3 items), problem (3 items), difference (3 items), how_it_works (3 items). Content must reference real state-specific alcohol laws, regulatory bodies, and compliance requirements. Also add entries to state_map.json.

tasks.title: Add state JSON: IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MD
tasks.description: Create assets/js/{state}.json for IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MD following ga.json pattern. Add entries to state_map.json. Content must reference real state-specific alcohol laws.

tasks.title: Add state JSON: MA, MS, MO, MT, NE, NH, NM
tasks.description: Create assets/js/{state}.json for MA, MS, MO, MT, NE, NH, NM following ga.json pattern. Add entries to state_map.json.

tasks.title: Add state JSON: ND, OK, OR, RI, SC, SD, UT
tasks.description: Create assets/js/{state}.json for ND, OK, OR, RI, SC, SD, UT following ga.json pattern. Add entries to state_map.json.

tasks.title: Add state JSON: VT, WV, WI, WY, AK, AL
tasks.description: Create assets/js/{state}.json for VT, WV, WI, WY, AK, AL following ga.json pattern. Add entries to state_map.json. This completes all 50 states.

tasks.title: Update sitemap.xml with all state pages
tasks.description: Update sitemap.xml to include /route-accounting/state/{abbrev} URLs for all 50 states + DC. Each should have lastmod of today's date and changefreq of monthly.

tasks.title: Add Open Graph meta tags to all pages
tasks.description: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type meta tags to index.html, route-accounting/index.html, pricing/index.html, and contact-us.html. Use the Ruby Pro logo as og:image. Add twitter:card meta tags too.
acceptanceCriteria: OG tags on all 4 main pages

tasks.title: Add canonical URLs to all pages
tasks.description: Add <link rel='canonical'> tags to every HTML page pointing to https://www.rubyprosoftware.com/{path}. This prevents duplicate content issues.
